unit: plan (multi-plan phase; entries below are PLANS, not tasks within one plan)

completed_tasks.name: PILOT: harness overhaul + 11 Ch.6 basic leaves + README scaffold + calibration SUMMARY (62 name->slug map + rubric anchors)
principles.md (Ch.2)
completed_tasks.progress: authored + oracle-converged pre-session; check-principles 7/8 RED (missing literal token 'definition'); needs a 1-token own-framing fix + 07-03-SUMMARY before the phase gate

completed_tasks.name: Oracle-reviewer rubric sharpened (3 anchors) + agent-reviewed (2 lenses) + reloaded
Ch.11 refactoring APIs (11 leaves, incl. Return Modified Value [web-only]); first chapter on the sharpened rubric
Targeted delta re-review of 18 Ch.6-10 leaves vs the SHARPENED axes (cross-ref aptness + spirit/judgment) -- re-ran from scratch via 3 chapter-grouped oracle-reviewer calls (5/8/5)
completed_tasks.result: 18/18 pass; no leaf changed (NO-OP). No revise/blocked/error, no too_close_to_source. Benign note: Rename Field + Move Statements into Function cite Change Function Declaration where source uses its 'Rename Function' alias (same catalog entry, apt).

completed_tasks.name: Ch.12 dealing with inheritance (11 leaves) -- last catalog chapter
completed_tasks.result: 11/11 converged (R1 7 pass/4 revise, R2 2 pass/2 revise, R3 2 pass; 1 too_close_to_source on push-down-method resolved by blind reword; 0 owner escalations). Catalog now 62/62. Inverse-of pairs (Pull Up<->Push Down for Method and Field) declared mutually.

completed_tasks.name: principles.md definition-token fix + 07-03-SUMMARY
completed_tasks.result: check-principles now 8/8 GREEN via a one-line own-framing lead-in supplying the literal 'definition' token; own-words, no oracle re-review. 07-03-SUMMARY.md written. FWL-03 satisfied (closes phase-wide at 07-10).

remaining_tasks.name: Wave 4: 24 smell leaves + navigation smells.md + finalize README (Ch.7-12 rows) + FULL checker battery GREEN = phase gate

human_actions_pending.action: If a future leaf's oracle-reviewer returns error because the source lacks that entry, flag to owner to add its Markdown to .oracle/
human_actions_pending.context: owner provisions .oracle/ chapters; already added Return Modified Value to Ch.11

decisions.decision: Orchestrator drives content plans INLINE (NOT via gsd-executor subagents)
decisions.rationale: the clean-room loop needs the Agent tool (spawn oracle/oracle-reviewer) and AskUserQuestion (owner escalation); gsd-executor has neither

decisions.decision: Chapter-by-chapter cadence with a PAUSE after each chapter for owner review
decisions.rationale: owner preference from the pilot checkpoint

decisions.decision: Oracle-reviewer rubric SHARPENED (3 anchors): (1) mechanics scores cross-ref aptness; (2) our principles/sibling back-edges are benign additions, not invented limits; (3) spirit->spirit/judgment
decisions.rationale: surfaced by Ch.6-10 rounds; owner-approved; agent-reviewed (firewall SAFE, consistency CLEAN); reloaded; first used on Ch.11

decisions.decision: Targeted subset (18 leaves) for the Ch.6-10 back-review, not a full re-gate
decisions.rationale: only #1 (aptness) + #3 (judgment) opened coverage gaps; #2 only relaxes so cannot hide a defect; scoped to non-inverse cross-links + judgment-flavored leaves

decisions.decision: Fixed the botched `@ ` commit-subject prefix on the 6 session commits via rebase; switched idiom to git commit -F <file>
decisions.rationale: git commit -m @'...'@ in Git Bash prepended a literal @ line (single-quote closed early on apostrophes); rebase strip verified content-identical

decisions.decision: Split Phase [web-example] DROPPED; Return Modified Value [web-only] is the sole provenance marker (Ch.11, gate-able)
decisions.rationale: owner adjudication; cut relics stay cut (4 relics out of the 62)

next_action: Working tree clean; catalog 62/62 (all seven catalog chapters authored). Delta re-review and Ch.12 (07-09) are both DONE -- do NOT re-run. NEXT: /gsd-execute-phase 7 -> 07-10 (Wave 4): author the 24 smell leaves (CONTENT_TYPE smell-leaf: candidates/recognition/motivation/applicability/spirit -- NOT refactoring-leaf axes) via the same clean-room loop, write the navigation-only smells.md, finalize the README Ch.7-12 rows, and turn the FULL checker battery GREEN (check-catalog 62/62, check-smells 24/24, check-crossrefs) = the phase gate. 07-10 OWNS README.md + the checker .mjs. Also fix 07-03 principles.md (add the 'definition' token) + write 07-03-SUMMARY before the full-battery gate. Then phase close: verify_phase_goal -> secure-phase -> validate-phase -> extract-learnings.
context_notes: Delta re-review + Ch.12 (07-09) COMPLETE (2026-07-05) -- do not re-run; catalog 62/62. Oracle agents are LIVE + RELOADED with the sharpened rubric. FIREWALL (blocking): main context NEVER reads .oracle/ (ls for names only); only the oracle/oracle-reviewer subagents read it. 07-10 is the LAST plan and (unlike the wave-3 chapter plans) DOES own README.md + the checker .mjs; check-catalog mirror + check-crossrefs were RED-by-design until now and close at this gate. Distinct example domains/identifiers (never the source's) to avoid too_close_to_source; note the DST-04 gate can fire on ACCIDENTAL collision even on terse steps (Ch.12 push-down-method), so reword blind if flagged. Commit via git commit -F <msgfile> (NOT -m @'...'@).
